C

CAPTAIN - Enum constant in enum class model.TypeWorker
 
ChangePasswordAdminWindow - Class in view
Dialog that allows changing an administrator password.
ChangePasswordAdminWindow(ListAdminWindow, LoginController, String) - Constructor for class view.ChangePasswordAdminWindow
Creates a new dialog to change the administrator's password.
checkAdminExists(String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Checks if an administrator exists by calling the checkAdminExists method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided name and returns the result.
checkAdminExists(String) - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Checks if an administrator exists by calling the checkAdminExists method with the provided name and returns the result.
checkAdminExists(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method checks if an administrator with the given name already exists in the database.
checkClientInBook(String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Checks if a client is associated with any booking by calling the checkClientInBook method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
checkClientInBook(String) - Method in interface model.ClientDAO
Checks if a client exists by calling the checkClientInBook method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client id and returns the result.
checkClientInBook(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationClient
Validates whether a given client ID handles active reservations under the book logs.
checkCruiseInBook(String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Checks if a cruise is associated with any booking by calling the checkCruiseInBook method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
checkCruiseInBook(String) - Method in interface model.CruiseDAO
Checks if a cruise is associated with any booking by calling the checkCruiseInBook method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
checkCruiseInBook(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationCruise
This method checks if a cruise with the given identifier (id) is associated with at least one booking in the database.
checkCruiseInWorker(String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Checks if a cruise is associated with any worker by calling the checkCruiseInWorker method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
checkCruiseInWorker(String) - Method in interface model.CruiseDAO
Checks if a cruise is associated with any worker by calling the checkCruiseInWorker method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
checkCruiseInWorker(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationCruise
This method checks if a cruise with the given identifier (id) is associated with at least one worker in the database.
checkUser(Administrator) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Checks if an administrator's credentials are valid.
checkUser(Administrator) - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Checks if an administrator exists by calling the checkAdminExists method with the provided name and returns the result.
checkUser(Administrator) - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method checks if the provided administrator's credentials (name and password) exist in the database.
CHINESE - Enum constant in enum class model.Language
 
Client - Class in model
Represents a Client interacting with the cruise system.
Client() - Constructor for class model.Client
Default constructor for creating an empty client structure.
Client(String, String, String, int, int, String) - Constructor for class model.Client
Complete constructor for creating a populated client entity.
ClientDAO - Interface in model
Data Access Object interface defining operations for Client entities.
controller - package controller
 
COOK - Enum constant in enum class model.TypeWorker
 
createBooking(Book) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Creates a new booking entry.
createBooking(Book) - Method in interface model.BookDAO
Creates a new booking in the underlying database.
createBooking(Book) - Method in class model.DBImplementationBook
Creates a new booking using a stored procedure in the database.
Cruise - Class in model
Represents a Cruise entity detailing its characteristics and capacity.
Cruise() - Constructor for class model.Cruise
Default constructor that initializes the cruise's information to default values.
Cruise(int, TypeCruise, String, int, int) - Constructor for class model.Cruise
Constructor that initializes the cruise's information with the provided code, type, name, number of rooms, and maximum capacity.
CruiseDAO - Interface in model
Data Access Object interface defining operations for Cruise management.
